title: helictotrichon gervaisii subsp. arundanum
intro: Helictotrichon gervaisii subsp. arundanum, also known as the Arundun Blue Oat Grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to promote digestion and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helictotrichon gervaisii subsp. arundanum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and even help manage diabetes. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
